title: taraxacum linguatiforme
intro: Taraxacum linguatiforme, also known as the Japanese dandelion, is a species of dandelion native to East Asia, characterized by its unique linguatiforme leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum linguatiforme include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and infusions, often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
